name: Apple Black Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and cooking oil.
2. Add eggs, beating until fluffy.
3. Sift dry ingredients together and add to the sugar, oil, and egg mixture.
4. Blend in vanilla extract.
5. Fold in black walnuts and chopped apples.
6. Pour batter into a well-greased and floured loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
Icing:
1. Soften butter.
2. Blend with powdered sugar until smooth.
3. Add vanilla extract.
4. Adjust consistency with cream if needed, to make it spreadable.
5. Spread icing on the cooled cake.
